sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54086" key="katakai/numai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατακαίνυμαι</orth>, <tns opt="n" TEIform="tns">pf.</tns> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-κέκασμαι</foreign>, <sense id="n54086.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be adorned</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κεφαλῇ κατὰ γυῖα κέκασται</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:134:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">134.1</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
